예레미야애가 5:1.content: Remember, Yahweh, what has come on us. Look, and see our reproach.

예레미야애가 5:2.content: Our inheritance has been turned over to strangers, our houses to aliens.

예레미야애가 5:3.content: We are orphans and fatherless. Our mothers are as widows.

예레미야애가 5:4.content: We have drunken our water for money. Our wood is sold to us.

예레미야애가 5:5.content: Our pursuers are on our necks. We are weary, and have no rest.

예레미야애가 5:6.content: We have given our hands to the Egyptians, and to the Assyrians, to be satisfied with bread.

예레미야애가 5:7.content: Our fathers sinned, and are no more. We have borne their iniquities.

예레미야애가 5:8.content: Servants rule over us. There is no one to deliver us out of their hand.

예레미야애가 5:9.content: We get our bread at the peril of our lives, because of the sword of the wilderness.

예레미야애가 5:10.content: Our skin is black like an oven, because of the burning heat of famine.

예레미야애가 5:11.content: They ravished the women in Zion, the virgins in the cities of Judah.

예레미야애가 5:12.content: Princes were hanged up by their hands. The faces of elders were not honored.

예레미야애가 5:13.content: The young men carry millstones. The children stumbled under loads of wood.

예레미야애가 5:14.content: The elders have ceased from the gate, and the young men from their music.

예레미야애가 5:15.content: The joy of our heart has ceased. Our dance is turned into mourning.

예레미야애가 5:16.content: The crown has fallen from our head. Woe to us, for we have sinned!

예레미야애가 5:17.content: For this our heart is faint. For these things our eyes are dim.

예레미야애가 5:18.content: For the mountain of Zion, which is desolate. The foxes walk on it.

예레미야애가 5:19.content: You, Yahweh, remain forever. Your throne is from generation to generation.

예레미야애가 5:20.content: Why do you forget us forever, and forsake us for so long a time?

예레미야애가 5:21.content: Turn us to yourself, Yahweh, and we will be turned. Renew our days as of old.

예레미야애가 5:22.content: But you have utterly rejected us. You are very angry against us.
